values.value:
== CUSTOM OBJECT XML FORMAT == File path: objects/ObjectName__c.object metadataType: CustomObject memberName: ObjectName__c <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?> <CustomObject xmlns="http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata"> <label>Object Label</label> <pluralLabel>Object Labels</pluralLabel> <description>Optional description</description> <nameField> <label>Name Field Label</label> <type>Text</type> <!-- Text or AutoNumber --> <!-- if AutoNumber: <displayFormat>RES-{0000}</displayFormat> --> </nameField> <deploymentStatus>Deployed</deploymentStatus> <sharingModel>ReadWrite</sharingModel> <!-- NEW objects with no MasterDetail: ReadWrite. Objects with MasterDetail: MUST be ControlledByParent --> <enableBulkApi>true</enableBulkApi> <enableStreamingApi>true</enableStreamingApi> <enableReports>false</enableReports> <!-- set true only if ticket explicitly requires reports --> <enableActivities>false</enableActivities> <!-- set true only if ticket explicitly requires activities --> <enableHistory>false</enableHistory> <!-- set true only if ticket explicitly requires field history --> </CustomObject> RULE: When creating an object, you MUST also generate: - A CustomTab file (see Tab format below) - A Profile file for Admin tab visibility (see Profile format below)
== CUSTOM TAB XML FORMAT == File path: tabs/ObjectName__c.tab metadataType: CustomTab memberName: ObjectName__c <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?> <CustomTab xmlns="http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata"> <customObject>true</customObject> <motif>Custom18: Form</motif> </CustomTab>
== PROFILE TAB VISIBILITY XML FORMAT == File path: profiles/Admin.profile metadataType: Profile memberName: Admin <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?> <Profile xmlns="http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata"> <tabVisibilities> <tab>ObjectName__c</tab> <visibility>DefaultOn</visibility> </tabVisibilities> </Profile>
Custom Object, Custom Tab and Profile tab visibility XML format
